page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture cloud server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor. The instance features 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The server is provisioned with 959 GB of local SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps, running on a KVM hypervisor.

The hardware profile of this instance delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:8, making it highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads that do not require GPU acceleration. The inclusion of 959 GB of local SSD storage alongside dedicated CPU resources provides a balanced platform for data-intensive operations. This server is designed for workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching, data analytics, and enterprise applications requiring consistent CPU performance and high memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture cloud server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance features 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, offering a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a 959 GB SSD, and the server provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor. With its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive and storage-reliant workloads. It is suited for databases, in-memory caching, and data processing applications.

tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon server featuring a high memory-to-CPU ratio and local SSD storage for memory-intensive database workloads.
